mapper.sql: DB_USER, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_DEPT, CREATE_DATE, CANCEL, STOP_DATE
mapper.insert: insert into USERS (DB_USER, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_DEPT, CREATE_DATE, CANCEL, STOP_DATE) values (#{dbUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cancel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into USERS
DB_USER,
USER_ID,
USER_NAME,
USER_DEPT,
CREATE_DATE,
CANCEL,
STOP_DATE,
#{dbUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{cancel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stopDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update USERS
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_DEPT = #{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_DATE = #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CANCEL = #{cancel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOP_DATE = #{stopDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where DB_USER = #{dbUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update USERS set USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_DEPT = #{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_DATE = #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CANCEL = #{cancel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOP_DATE = #{stopDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where DB_USER = #{dbUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
